summary: Iteration 1 testing of flicksfromnai photographer portfolio. Backend: 14/14 pytest cases passed (photos list/filter/featured, admin verify, full CRUD with X-Admin-Key auth, 401/404 negative paths). Frontend: home, portfolio (15 photos, all 5 category filters, /portfolio/:category deeplink, lightbox open/close with prev-next arrows), admin login (wrong key shows error, correct key opens dashboard with Add/Logout/featured toggles/delete), Add-photo dialog renders all 7 form fields, mobile hamburger menu opens with nav links. No critical issues.

issues: Hero 'flicks from / nai.' headline overlaps the model's face slightly on 1920px; intentional editorial style but on narrow desktops the right-aligned 'nai.' word may cut close to edge

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is referenced inside seed_default_photos (line 165) but defined later at line 182. Works due to module-load order (startup runs after load), but it's fragile. Move logging.basicConfig + logger = ... above the seed function for clarity.
server.py: `@app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown')` is deprecated in FastAPI; migrate to lifespan context manager.
server.py: No pagination on GET /api/photos (to_list(1000)). Fine for MVP, but should add limit/offset before scaling.
server.py: Admin uses a single shared static key from env — acceptable per product decision, but consider rate-limiting POST /api/admin/verify to deter brute force.
Frontend Admin: file upload field accepts files up to 5MB but no client-side validation visible in the dialog screenshot beyond the helper text — confirm validation exists in Admin.js.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 15 photos on startup if collection empty. Test created+deleted one TEST_Photo (cleaned up).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 19 review-request items verified passing. Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is the regression baseline (covers list/filter/featured/admin verify/CRUD + 401/404). Frontend uses external REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Admin auth is X-Admin-Key header (no JWT). Lightbox uses close (X) + prev/next arrows + Escape. Mobile hamburger is the first header button.
